mapper.select: SELECT sido_code, sigungu_code, name, alias FROM sigungu ORDER BY sido_code, sigungu_code
SELECT sido_code, sigungu_code, name, alias FROM sigungu WHERE sido_code = #{sidoCode} ORDER BY sigungu_code
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sigungu (sido_code, sigungu_code, name) VALUES (#{sidoCode}, #{sigunguCode}, #{name}) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE name = VALUES(name)
